mapper.select: SELECT up.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.author AS poem_author, u.username FROM user_purchase up LEFT JOIN poem p ON up.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON up.user_id = u.id WHERE up.id = #{id}

SELECT up.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.author AS poem_author, u.username FROM user_purchase up LEFT JOIN poem p ON up.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON up.user_id = u.id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY up.purchased_at DESC

SELECT up.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.author AS poem_author, u.username FROM user_purchase up LEFT JOIN poem p ON up.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON up.user_id = u.id WHERE up.user_id = #{userId} AND up.poem_id = #{poemId}

SELECT up.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.author AS poem_author, u.username FROM user_purchase up LEFT JOIN poem p ON up.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON up.user_id = u.id WHERE up.order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_purchase (user_id, poem_id, order_no, amount, status, pay_method, expired_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{poemId}, #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{payMethod}, #{expiredAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_purchase SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_purchase WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND poem_id = #{poemId} AND status = 'SUCCESS'
SELECT up.*, p.title AS poem_title, p.author AS poem_author, u.username FROM user_purchase up LEFT JOIN poem p ON up.poem_id = p.id LEFT JOIN user u ON up.user_id = u.id ORDER BY up.purchased_at DESC
